## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it belongs in the public core.

## Proof

- [ ] I ran the smallest relevant test and recorded the result below.
- [ ] I ran lint and TypeScript checks when TypeScript changed.
- [ ] I ran the Docker-backed gate, or stated why it could not run.

```text
command:
result:
```

## Safety and scope

- [ ] This does not add mock discovery, execution, audit, metric, or drift behaviour.
- [ ] New execution support has a real target contract, server-side validation, organisation scoping, audit records, and persisted-state tests.
- [ ] I documented migrations, deployment changes, or known limitations.
